name: Pimp My Type
oneLine: Typography education from Oliver Schöndorfer, focused on stronger UI and web typography for better UX.
bio: Oliver Schöndorfer is an Austrian typography consultant and UI designer with 15+ years of experience helping teams improve usability, accessibility, brand consistency, and typographic systems. Pimp My Type collects his practical typography teaching across YouTube, articles, Font Friday, talks, workshops, and mentoring.
style: Friendly, practical typography breakdowns for designers and developers, usually turning fuzzy visual taste into concrete UI decisions.
